project: Woodwind Design Automation - Bass Clarinet Focus

key_findings.tmm_model: VALIDATED - tanner/untanner = normalized admittance (Y=j·tan(kL)). Junction3 = parallel admittance addition. -0.5 phase = R=-1 reflection. Valid for 70-150Hz (plane-wave regime, 8kHz cutoff for 25mm bore).
key_findings.register_hole: 80mm from reed, 2.5mm dia, 3mm chimney - validated by Szwarcberg 2024 for 588mm bore; scaled to 1211mm = ~165mm but 80mm works for 7-hole model.
key_findings.sequential_12hole: PHYSICS LIMITED - 15.5c RMS on 2nd register regardless of hole size (8-20mm) or graduation. Bell-end-first fails (holes ineffective at 70-150Hz). Reed-end-first sequential works but doesn't match real bass clarinet fingering.
key_findings.real_bass_clarinet: 22-25 toneholes with cross-fingerings, not 12 sequential. 7-hole diatonic based on Denner tenor (Munich Mu 136) scaled 1.335x: 6.19c/9.51c RMS.
key_findings.cross_fingerings: Required for chromatic expansion beyond 7 holes. Need functional classification: 7 primary + 3 corrective + 2 vents (ChatGPT chart). But need >12 holes or larger holes for effectiveness at 70-150Hz.
key_findings.bass_chalumeau: Kress bass (Salzburg A-Salzburg 8/1) = ONLY surviving bass chalumeau. No register key, no overblowing. Munich Mu 136 = Denner TENOR, not bass. Range C3-G4.

7_hole_diatonic.results: 1st reg: 0.04c RMS, 2nd reg: 7.96c RMS, twelfths: 9.5c RMS

12_hole_sequential.note: Reed-end sequential works; bell-end-first fails. Not real bass clarinet fingering.

next_steps: Implement ChatGPT cross-fingering chart (13x13) with proper hole positions
Add bore taper optimization (1-3 vars for conical profile)
Add bell flare back once chromatic fingerings work
Research: contact Salzburg Museum for Kress bass measurements
Extend to full 22-25 hole Boehm system

primary: Benade (1976) Fundamentals of Musical Acoustics Ch.20-24
Nederveen (1998) Acoustical Aspects of Woodwind Instruments
measurements: Munich Mu 136 (Denner tenor): bore 14.5mm, length 620mm, holes ~5mm
Kress bass (Salzburg): only surviving bass chalumeau
Modern bass clarinets: 23-24mm bore, 22-25 holes, 1211mm length
